title: Dressrosa’s Hidden System Emerges
description: Pages 13–13 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Colosseum Fighters, Doflamingo Family, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #21, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #7 as dressrosa’s Corrida Colosseum becomes the center of attention as Luffy enters under the name Lucy and learns the Flame-Flame Fruit is the prize.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Let's get this thing started already!!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo Family
dialogue.text: You think young master would tell such a point- less lie!?

summary: Pages 13–13 focus on dressrosa’s hidden system emerges, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
